hooks.command: [Console]::InputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if (-not $f) { $f = $json.tool_response.filePath }; if ($f -like '*drafts*') { $repo = 'C:\Users\admin\claude-x-ops'; git -C $repo add "$f"; $staged = git -C $repo diff --cached --name-only; if ($staged) { git -C $repo commit -m "draft: $(Split-Path $f -Leaf)" *> $null; git -C $repo push origin main *> $null } }
